title: Bihar BPSC APO Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for Assistant Prosecution Officer
description: BPSC APO Recruitment 2026 notification released. Apply online for Assistant Prosecution Officer posts. Check eligibility, age limit, salary, exam date and full details.
keywords: BPSC APO 2026, Bihar APO Vacancy 2026, Assistant Prosecution Officer Recruitment, BPSC Jobs 2026, BPSC APO Apply Online, Sarkari Result BPSC APO
job-heading: Bihar BPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer (APO) Recruitment 2026
introduction: Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the notification for Assistant Prosecution Officer (APO) Recruitment 2026. Candidates who are interested in law-based government jobs can apply online after checking all eligibility criteria, age limit, and important dates.
recruitment-body: Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) invites online applications for the post of Assistant Prosecution Officer (APO). This is a great opportunity for candidates having a law degree to secure a government job in Bihar. Selection will be based on written examination and interview.
qualification: Bachelor Degree in Law (LLB) from any recognized university in India.
eligibility: Candidates must have a Bachelor Degree in Law (LLB). Knowledge of local language and legal procedures is preferred.
selection-method: Prelims Written Exam, Mains Exam, Interview
